data.content: Implementation review requested changes. In src/lib/doctor.ts the prompt-guidance fix path only replaces the first managed guidance block (), so repositories already polluted by duplicate FOOLERY guidance blocks keep stale duplicate content after . That falls short of a clean/upsert-style repair for the bug being fixed. Please collapse all managed guidance blocks to one canonical block and add a regression test covering a file with two existing managed blocks. Verified doctor tests still pass locally: 93/93 across doctor.test.ts, doctor-applyfix.test.ts, and doctor-coverage.test.ts.
